reference_text: Mary had a little lamb whose fleece was white as snow.
candidate_text: Mary had a little lamp whose leaves were white as snow.

reference_text: Please transfer fifteen dollars to Maya before Friday.
candidate_text: Please transfer fifty dollars to Maya before Friday.

reference_text: Do not restart the server until the database backup finishes.
candidate_text: Do restart the server until the database backup finishes.

reference_text: Schedule the follow-up with Dr. Chen at the Pine Street clinic.
candidate_text: Schedule the follow-up with Dr. Cheng at the Pine Street clinic.

reference_text: The benefits enrollment deadline is Monday at 9 am.
candidate_text: The benefits enrollment deadline is Tuesday at 9 am.

reference_text: Start the migration window tonight at 10 pm after traffic drops.
candidate_text: Start the migration window tonight at 10 am after traffic drops.
